title: Incorporators
doc_html:
§405.  Incorporators

Five or more natural persons, or two or more cooperatives, may organize a cooperative in the manner hereinafter provided.  

Renumbered from R.S.1950, §12:305 by Acts 1968, No. 105, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1969.

§405.  Incorporators
Five or more natural persons, or two or more cooperatives, may organize a cooperative in the manner hereinafter provided.
Renumbered from R.S.1950, §12:305 by Acts 1968, No. 105, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1969.
